---
title: "Contact Me"
---

# Get In Touch {{< fa phone >}}
Whether you would like to discuss analytics, psychology, tennis, or anything in between, I'd love to hear
from you!

## Email {{< fa solid envelope >}}
::: callout-note
**Email:**
[muireann.ryle2@mail.dcu.ie](mailto:muireann.ryle2@mail.dcu.ie)
:::

---
## Social Links

The best places to find me online:
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/muireann-ryle-2797242a0/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/muireann-ryle)

## Quick Contact Card

<div style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px; max-width: 350px;">
<h3> Muireann Ryle</h3>
<p><strong>Business Analytics | Psychology | Mathematics</strong></p>
<p>{{< fa solid location-dot >}} Dublin / Kildare</p>
<p>{{< fa solid envelope >}} <a href="mailto:muireann.ryle2@mail.dcu.ie">muireann.ryle2@mail.dcu.ie</a></p>
</div>
